title: rubus agrestis
intro: Rubus agrestis, also known as the wild raspberry or wood raspberry, is a species of raspberry plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus agrestis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Rubus agrestis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
